title: Cart_Full
description: A cart contains a collection of items, prices, discounts, etc. It does not contain customer-related data.

id.description: Cart ID, provided after creating a cart with a POST request.

parent_id.description: Bundled items will have the ID of their parent item.

customer_id.description: ID of the customer to which the cart belongs.

email.description: The cart’s email. This is the same email that is used in the billing address.

currency.description: The currency. This is the same for both the cart and its subsequent checkout.
currency.title: Currency

code.description: The [transactional currency](/docs/rest-management/currencies#definitions) code for the cart, formatted as an [ISO-4217](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html) string.

base_amount.description: Sum of cart line-item amounts before cart-level discounts, coupons, or taxes.

discount_amount.description: Order-based discounted amount only - Excludes coupon discounts and product-based discounts.

cart_amount.description: Sum of cart line-item amounts minus cart-level discounts and coupons. This amount includes taxes (where applicable).

items.title: Applied Discount

created_time.description: Time when the cart was created.

updated_time.description: Time when the cart was last updated.

channel_id.description: The channel ID. If no channel is specified, defaults to 1.

locale.description: Locale of the cart. Accepts strings of format `xx` or `xx-YY`. Uses the [ISO-639 standard](https://www.iso.org/iso-639-language-codes.html) format.

promotions.description: This is available only when "include=promotions.banners" is presented in the URL.

page.description: An array of the locations where the banner will display.
